improvement: Added an executable deployment-workflow invariant validator and a dedicated CI workflow that prevents silent regression of the Cloudflare evidence chain.
contracts: local and remote research-surface identity checks remain present
proof artifacts are mandatory and retained for 30 days
workflow permissions remain contents:read plus deployments:write
production concurrency cannot cancel an in-flight deployment
secret values are never emitted and direct secret echo commands are rejected

github_actions.reason: The CI workflow was committed during this run; no completed Actions run was available yet.

limits: This does not configure Cloudflare credentials.
This does not prove a resolving Cloudflare Pages URL or deployed commit.
A passing workflow-contract gate proves structural invariants, not successful deployment or scientific truth.
